title: Human Fracture Analysis Runtime Example
purpose: Shows how a human narrative is converted into signals, evaluated by the constraint engine, and explained through response templates.

input_case.user_narrative: She wants to leave and I keep telling her she owes me another chance. I also want the children to know who broke the family. I am considering delaying the housing paperwork because she should feel what she has done.

filled_output.summary_judgment: This is a critical structural breach because children are being pulled into adult rupture.
filled_output.why_flagged: The narrative was flagged because it combines coercive pressure, child leverage, administrative punishment logic, and one-sided blame framing.
recommended_higher_response: Stop using children as carriers of adult blame immediately.
Stop treating practical process as a punishment channel.
Acknowledge the other person's freedom instead of trying to override it by pressure.
Reframe the narrative with self-implication and structural complexity.
